---
title: "About"
---

## The module

Spatial Epidemiology and Applied Data Science is the Second Module (Intermediate level) of the
DMgtAsia course. It draws on spatial data science trainings and workshops run across India, and
is packaged here as a self-paced or intensive workshop with hands-on R exercises and
auto-graded quizzes.

## Authors

- **Prof. (Dr.) Biju Soman**, Achutha Menon Centre for Health Science Studies, SCTIMST, Trivandrum
- **Dr. Arun Mitra**, All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), Bibinagar, Hyderabad, Telangana

## Source & licence

Source repository: <https://github.com/drarunmitra/DMgtAsia_Spatial_Module>

Teaching materials are released under CC-BY-SA; code under MIT, unless noted otherwise.
Datasets keep their original licences (NMC, NFHS, WHO, SEDAC GPWv4, `HistData`).

## Acknowledgements

With thanks to **Dr. Gurpreet Singh**, Associate Professor, Armed Forces Medical College
(AFMC), Pune, Maharashtra.

Built on the `sf`, `spdep`, `rgeoda`, `exactextractr`, `tidygeocoder`, `ggspatial` and
`tidyverse` packages, and on the CDC GeoSWG cartographic guidelines.
